hero.headline: When Charleston pipes act up, *we show up*
hero.subheadline: Real plumber, real truck, real solutions — not a call center.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every pipe, every fixture, every flow
services_section.subheading: From kitchen sinks to full repiping — handled right the first time.

services.title: Leak Repair
services.description: Stop water damage before it starts. We find the source and fix it permanently.

services.title: Drain Cleaning
services.description: Clogs cleared fast with professional equipment. No harsh chemicals.

services.title: Repiping & PEX Installation
services.description: Upgrade old pipes to modern PEX. Better flow, fewer problems.

services.title: Fixture Installation
services.description: Sinks, toilets, water heaters installed properly the first time.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing
services.description: When disaster strikes, we're ready to respond and restore.

about.heading: Quinton McCloud
about.body: Charleston plumber who answers his own phone. One call gets you the guy who actually does the work.

reviews.name: Dustin S.
reviews.text: Quinton was fantastic — excellent communicator, super friendly, and tackled a job that turned out way more difficult than expected.

reviews.name: Kristi S.
reviews.text: Quintin is great! Went above and beyond for our repair.

reviews.name: Joe M.
reviews.text: Kitchen remodel plumbing including new sink, rerouted piping, PEX upgrade, and 3 new toilets. Could not be more impressed with the results.

cta.heading: Ready to fix it right?
cta.body: Call the plumber Charleston trusts. Free estimates, upfront pricing, no surprises.
